message:
Reset cluster selector when global filter changes

Cards with "select cluster" dropdown now respond to global filter:
- HelmReleaseStatus: Reset to '' when selected cluster no longer available
- OperatorStatus: Reset to 'all' when selected cluster no longer available
- OperatorSubscriptions: Reset to 'all' when selected cluster no longer available
- CRDHealth: Reset to 'all' when selected cluster no longer available

This ensures users don't see stale data from a cluster that's been
filtered out of the global selection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
